title: Tax Consultant
responsibilities: prepare tax calculations and compliance documents; analyze legislation changes and client impact; advise stakeholders on tax risks and optimization opportunities
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in tax compliance, tax planning, excel, accounting, tax legislation. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: DataBridge is hiring a middle tax consultant to support supporting businesses with tax compliance, planning, and advisory work.
raw_text: Vacancy V098: Tax Consultant at DataBridge. Location: Lviv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 2.3 years. Required skills: tax compliance, tax planning, excel, accounting, tax legislation, transfer pricing, reporting. Optional skills: financial modeling, ifrs, erp. Responsibilities: prepare tax calculations and compliance documents; analyze legislation changes and client impact; advise stakeholders on tax risks and optimization opportunities.
